text.title: Quality Attributes Framework Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the quality-attributes methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: elicit-scenarios
step.action: Capture each NFR as a 6-field scenario.

step.name: cover-iso25010
step.action: Group scenarios into ISO-25010 categories; mark missing categories.

step.name: build-utility-tree
step.action: Assign importance + difficulty to each scenario.

step.name: translate-to-sli-slo
step.action: Pick an SLI per scenario; set SLO numbers; wire monitoring.

step.name: publish-spec
step.action: Compose NFR spec + tradeoff matrix; review with stakeholders.
